prompt: [PROMPT: COMPLEX DYNAMIC WHITENED ISOMETRIC ILLUSTRATION] A clean, sophisticated isometric 3D vector illustration in the 'Whitened Dynamic Conceptual' style. A vertical flowchart showing the Translation Layer Pipeline — how qualitative human language gets translated into structured product filters. TOP SECTION: Three Orange #F59400 speech bubbles floating isometrically, containing recognizable icons representing qualitative constraints: a fluffy cloud with an X (no fluffy lining), a black paint swatch (black only), a running shoe silhouette (PE-compatible). Clean matte black #111111 outlines on each bubble. MIDDLE SECTION: A large Blue #6C82FE processing block labeled 'Translation Layer' in isometric perspective. Inside, three sub-modules are visible as smaller isometric boxes: (1) a document with magnifying glass icon representing NLP Analysis, (2) a camera/eye icon representing Image Recognition, (3) a checklist icon representing Spec Cross-Reference. From each module, thin precise flowing arcs (not chains) carry Confidence Signal percentages (94%, 88%, 71%) downward. White #FFFFFF faces on key surfaces for luminosity. BOTTOM SECTION split into two paths: LEFT PATH (Blue #6C82FE accent): Eight small shoe card icons representing successful translations — a checkmark above each. RIGHT PATH (Pink #FC6978 accent): Four icons with X marks representing untranslatable constraints — a shoe sole icon, a shoelace icon, a logo size icon, and a pattern swatch. Above these, a label reads 'Human's Own'. A matte black silhouette hand reaches from the right, touching the 'Human's Own' section. The entire composition sits on expansive Light Gray #EEEEEE background with generous negative space. All forms: clean uniform-weight matte black outlines. Soft-cell shading only.
negative_prompt: realistic rendering, photorealistic, gradients, textured outlines, decorative objects, chess pieces, dice, coins, dark background, cluttered, shadows on background, 3D photorealism, actual shoes, realistic products
